title: Good Boy - Mega Chewy Twist With Duck - Dog Treats - Made With 100% Natural Duck Breast Meat - 70 Grams ℮ - Low Fat Dog Treats - Case of 18
features: MADE WITH 100% NATURAL DUCK - I'm made with 100% natural duck breast meat so I'm sure to get your dogs' tail wagging
CHEWY TREATS: We all know dogs love to chew and my chewy rawhide texture is great for your dogs' dental hygiene
GRAIN FREE: I'm made using a delicious grain free recipe. This means I contain absolutely NO nasty hidden grains that will upset your dogs stomach sensitivites.
LOW FAT DOG TREATS: I'm low in fat meaning that I'm the perfect addition to your dogs' well balanced diet
PERFECT FOR MEDIUM AND LARGE DOGS: My favourite trick is making doggies tails waggle and my size means I'm the perfect treat for keeping medium and large sized dogs quiet for a while
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to our world! At Good Boy it's all about your dog - as the UK's #1 Dog Treat Brand , making sure you and your furry pals are happy is at the top of our priority list, starting with the tastiest treats, hearty dog's dinners and the coolest toys and accessories. Making dogs' tails waggle is second nature at Good Boy: our motto is: "if your dog is healthy and happy, so are we!". Real Meat Twists These super scrummy, chewy real meat twists are a real hit! With the chewy middle wrapped in yummy real meat - they are sure to go down a treat. Our best-selling treat is available in a range of tasty flavours and sizes for every size of dog. Find your perfect treat here: Good Boy - Chewy Twists With Chicken - Dog Treats - Made With 100% Natural Ch... Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 10,294 4.6 out of 5 stars 10,294 4.7 out of 5 stars 3,375 4.6 out of 5 stars 10,294 4.6 out of 5 stars 10,294 Flavour Chicken Duck Chicken Chicken Duck Paw-some Dog Treats We know just how important it is to feed your dog the right treats for their size, age and breed. We also know how important treats are for making your dog super happy. So here at Good Boy we have a huge range of dog treats in all different shapes, flavours and sizes to suit every occasion of treating your dog. Scrummy Meals Complete hearty meals, lovingly made in the UK with no nasties (no added sugar, no fillers, no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives). With tasty real meat and vegetables - our Home Faves recipes are vet approved for goodness, and dog approved for scrumminess! Wag-nificent Toys Any doggo will tell you - playtime is the best time. Our dog toys are designed so they can play their way! However your pup loves to play - whether you have a fetch fiend, or a softy snuggler - Good Boy has the perfect toy for them. Fur-tastic Health & Hygiene Good Boy is all about goodness - with our health and hygiene range, you can take care of your dog from nose to tail (and everything in between!). From enriching their mealtimes with scrummy salmon oil, to pampering their paws with our 100% organic nose and paw balm - perfect for the pampered pooch in your life.

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎To keep this treat in tip top condition, once opened, reseal and store somewhere cool and dry.
